creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
heya, LGTM in general. Nice to see this still baking!

Makefile:

- PORTVERSION should match the date of the git tag, not the date of port creation
- a truncated git sha is fine, 7 digits IIRC
- you should aim to pass `portlint -AC` , `rclint` & `portfmt` or at least appease them within reason, they're not perfect.

general:

Some things to consider around hier(7), I wouldn't expect to see a /var/lib/
on *BSD it feels like a linuxism. 

Is it possible to drop gotosocial-styling extra bits? I guess the .css and LICENCE and README.md are sufficient.

the /var/lib/gotosocial stuff, if it's readonly, should go in /usr/local/lib/gotosocial, or /usr/local/share/gotosocial. See hier(7) for details.

If you have a git url we can use that for the next iteration.
